title: Select all option is blocked all of a sudden
excerpt: I use the batch select all column everyday. Now the box is blocked out and you have to click on the 3 dot menu THEN click select all. Not a huge deal but def. inconvenient. What is the point of blocking out the select al…

posts.author: Johnsa9 (Ashley Morrison)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use the batch select all column everyday. Now the box is blocked out and you have to click on the 3 dot menu THEN click select all. Not a huge deal but def. inconvenient. What is the point of blocking out the select all at the top of the column you are SELECTING ALL of?
